---
title: "Girls’ Friendly Society: A Short Account of its Working in the Diocese of Winchester to the end of the year 1878, The"
---

## Girls’ Friendly Society: A Short Account of its Working in the Diocese of Winchester to the end of the year 1878, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1879
**Genre:** Non-fiction: instructions to charity workers
**Format:** Pamphlet

**Publisher:** Winchester: privately printed.

### Notes

There is a copy of this pamphlet in Lambeth Palace Library.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
